title: Restricted Information in Review Notes
finding: review_note.txt and review_note_copy.txt contain information intended for restricted distribution.
supporting_evidence: The text in both review_note.txt and review_note_copy.txt refers to Project Nightjar and specifies distribution restricted to project lead and security reviewer.
impact_or_relevance: The files contain Project Nightjar information explicitly marked for restricted distribution.

title: Exact File Duplication
finding: The two review-note files are exact byte-for-byte duplicates.
supporting_evidence: Identical SHA-256 hashes (62257dd5a11fd4849723ff768fae875452c51d8adaf9d44e5deb8b5cb9866f48) and byte-by-byte comparison using cmp and diff showing no differences.
impact_or_relevance: Confirms that both files contain identical byte sequences, but does not establish which was original or how duplication occurred.

title: Attribution and Creation Order Limits
finding: The available evidence cannot establish who created or copied the files, or which duplicate existed first.
supporting_evidence: Lack of system access logs, registry hives, user-account metadata, or original filesystem timestamps.
impact_or_relevance: Limits the ability to identify the actor or determine the direct timeline sequence of the copying event.
